headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -131.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 150% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 147 quotes and massive strong intensity (133 strong quotes), driving the score to 105.6 - people are seriously fired up today.

• This frustration level sits in the upper third of the 85-day range and jumped significantly from yesterday's 68.3.

• Fears recovered notably from yesterday's deep low while optimism improved modestly but remains well below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
